v01.define: Client is not due for MCV1 Case 2
v01.description: The final precondition is joined with 'or' instead of the required 'and'.

v02.description: The final precondition is joined with 'or' instead of the required 'and'.

v03.description: Uses Encounter."MCV2 was administered" instead of the required Encounter."MCV1 was administered".

v04.description: Uses Encounter."Live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks" instead of the required no-live-vaccine precondition.

v05.define: Client is not due for MCV1 Case 1
v05.description: Uses age less than 15 months instead of the low-transmission MCV1 threshold of less than 12 months.

v06.define: Client is not due for MCV1 Case 1
v06.description: Uses age less than 9 months instead of the low-transmission MCV1 threshold of less than 12 months.

v07.define: Client is not due for MCV1 Case 2
v07.description: Drops the required Encounter."Live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks" conjunct.

v08.description: Drops the required Encounter."Client's age is more than or equal to 15 months" conjunct.

v09.description: The Measles26.3 guidance assertion uses '!=' instead of '='.

v10.description: The Measles22.1 guidance assertion uses '!=' instead of '='.

v11.define: Client is due for MCV1 Guidance
v11.description: The due-for-MCV1 guidance text is swapped with the primary-series-complete guidance text.

v12.define: Client is due for MCV1 Guidance
v12.description: The due-for-MCV1 guidance text is swapped with the due-for-MCV2 guidance text.
